sample_requests: Convert Ensembl gene IDs to symbols in this AnnData before dynamo preprocessing
Turn the gene ID conversion tutorial into an executable workflow with zebrafish and human examples

smoke_commands.name: human-convert2gene_symbol
smoke_commands.command: ${PYTHON} -c "from dynamo.preprocessing.utils import convert2gene_symbol; df = convert2gene_symbol(['ENSG00000141510']); print(df.loc['ENSG00000141510', 'symbol'])"

smoke_commands.name: zebrafish-convert2symbol-with-scopes
smoke_commands.command: ${PYTHON} -c "import numpy as np; import anndata as ad; from dynamo.preprocessing.utils import convert2symbol; adata = ad.AnnData(X=np.ones((1, 1))); adata.var_names = ['ENSDARG00000035558.1']; convert2symbol(adata, scopes='ensembl.gene'); print(adata.var_names[0])"
